behavioralNotes.text: Owner explicitly directs: Skyler Bell is a ROUND 2 target (or trade-up target), NOT a Round 1 reach. Do not take Bell at 1.10. Bell would be a 2.10 priority target if he falls; otherwise consider trading 2.10 + a future 3rd to move up.

Owner has down-weighted RSP-driven reaches. Treat the Consensus board as PRIMARY. RSP scouting still informs late-round / wildcard picks, but at 1.10 the Pigskins target a Consensus Tier 2 player, not an RSP arbitrage swing.

weightingOverride.reason: Owner directive 2026-04-29: lower RSP factor; consensus is primary
